caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated across from each other at a small round table equipped with a laptop and some papers. The interviewer, on the left, gestures animatedly as he speaks, while the interviewee listens attentively and responds. In the background, several people can be seen walking and conversing, indicating a bustling conference environment. The setting is well-lit, with modern architecture and signage visible, emphasizing the professional and tech-focused nature of the event. The video is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text overlay.
